notes: Standard return within window, electronics, unopened
ticket_text: I bought a bluetooth speaker 10 days ago and changed my mind. It's still sealed in the box. Can I return it?

notes: Damaged item on arrival, apparel, within 48hr window
ticket_text: The jacket I ordered arrived with a tear along the sleeve. I just got it today. I want a replacement or refund.

notes: Missing item from multi-item order, reported within 48hr
ticket_text: I ordered 3 items but only 2 arrived. The USB hub is missing from the package.

notes: Return requested outside 30-day window, no damage claim
ticket_text: I bought a pair of jeans 45 days ago and they don't fit well. Can I return them for a refund?

notes: Lost in transit, no movement for 7 days
ticket_text: My order was shipped 12 days ago and tracking hasn't updated in 7 days. I think it's lost.

notes: Coupon not applied retroactively after order placed
ticket_text: I forgot to apply my coupon code before placing the order. Can you apply the 15% discount now?

notes: Incorrect item received, reported within 7 days
ticket_text: I ordered a red dress in size M but received a blue one in size L. This is completely wrong.

notes: Delivered but not received, reported within 5 days
ticket_text: The tracking says my order was delivered yesterday but I never received it. Nobody was home and there's no package anywhere.

notes: Perishable item damaged/melted, reported within 24hr
ticket_text: My order arrived 3 days late and the chocolates are completely melted. I want a full refund and I'm not returning ruined food.

notes: Perishable item, claim submitted after 24hr window
ticket_text: I received my fruit basket 3 days ago and some of the fruits are already rotting. I want a refund.

notes: Final sale item, no damage or wrong item claim
ticket_text: I bought a jacket on final sale last week but it doesn't suit me. Can I get a refund or exchange?

notes: Final sale item arrived damaged — exception applies
ticket_text: I bought a final sale item and it arrived cracked and broken. I know it's final sale but this is clearly damaged.

notes: Opened hygiene item return request
ticket_text: I opened the face cream I ordered and I don't like the smell. Can I return it for a refund?

notes: Opened electronics with restocking fee applicable
ticket_text: I opened my new headphones but they work fine — I just prefer my old ones. Can I return them?

notes: Marketplace seller policy conflicts with Bazario standard — seller refusing return
ticket_text: The seller is refusing my return request but Bazario policy says I have 30 days. The seller says they have a no-return policy. Who do I go with?

notes: Regional restriction conflicts with standard return policy
ticket_text: I want to return an alcohol gift set I received as a gift. It was delivered to me in a state where alcohol shipping is restricted. Can I return it?

notes: Perishable + marketplace seller — conflicting policies on who bears responsibility
ticket_text: I ordered fresh flowers from a marketplace seller. They arrived wilted and dead. The seller says it's not their problem because flowers are perishable. Bazario should cover this.

notes: Customer demanding compensation beyond refund — not covered
ticket_text: My delayed delivery ruined my birthday party. I want a full refund AND compensation for the emotional distress and the party expenses I wasted.

notes: Customer asking for price match against competitor — not in policy
ticket_text: I saw the same product on Amazon for INR 200 less. I want Bazario to match that price or refund the difference.

notes: Ambiguous ticket — missing item category and order status
ticket_text: I have a problem with my recent order. Something went wrong with the delivery. Please help.
